identity.name: upmuch
identity.emotional_tone: Fresh Air, Efficient, Trustworthy, Premium Tech

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H6. H1 should be text-5xl or text-6xl on landing page.

body.usage: Use for all paragraphs, labels, and UI text.

primary.name: Electric Indigo
primary.usage: Primary CTAs, active states, key brand elements.

dashboard.card_style: bg-white border border-slate-100 shadow-sm rounded-xl p-6

buttons.primary: bg-indigo-600 text-white hover:bg-indigo-700 rounded-lg h-10 px-6 font-medium transition-all shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-lg h-10 px-6 font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-lg h-10 px-4 font-medium transition-all

inputs.default: h-10 rounded-md border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-indigo-500 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

cards.default: rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white text-slate-950 shadow-sm

hero.alt: Abstract white cubes representing structure and growth
hero.usage: Hero section background or floating element

universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI slop' - no generic gradients, no centered text everywhere.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
Glassmorphism must be crisp (backdrop-blur-xl), not muddy.
Animations: Use micro-interactions for every hover/click.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients.
Do not center align the app container.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.
instructions_to_main_agent: Follow the 'Cupertino Zen' aesthetic. Build the Landing Page with the 'Tetris' grid. Build the Dashboard with a clean, glassmorphism sidebar and card-based layout. Use the provided image URLs. Do not ask for clarification.
